OptiGuard™ is a high-strength vision formula that synergistically combines multiple essential nutrients for comprehensive eye protection. On top of giving a functional dosage of 30mg free-form lutein and 15mg free-form zeaxanthin, OptiGuard™ is fortified with phospholipids, astaxanthin, EPA and DHA for comprehensive eye health support. To up the potency even more, Smart Liposomal Delivery improves the nutrient absorption by up to 8 times!

Lutein and zeaxanthin are encapsulated in liposomes, which protects the nutrients against destruction by stomach acid and the body’s harsh digestive system. The liposomes help transport lutein and zeaxanthin into intestinal cells more efficiently, thereby improving its absorption into the body than uncoated nutrients in other vision supplements.

Regular gelatin softgels can harden over time, resulting in poor absorption in the body. OmaxFresh® is proven to preserve optimal potency and freshness of the softgel throughout its shelf life.

Content:

60 softgels (1-month supply)

Direction of Use:

Take 2 softgels daily, separate from each other and after a meal.

Active Ingredients:

OptiGuard™ Proprietary Blend (30mg free-form lutein, 15mg meso-zeaxanthin & trans-zeaxanthin, blueberry extract, phospholipids, EPA, DHA & Astaxanthin), 20mg TruSaffron™ Saffron Extract, 50mg Vitamin C, 25mcg Vitamin D3, 10mcg Vitamin E

CONTAINS: CRUSTACEAN SHELLFISH (Krill)

Other ingredients:

OmaxFresh Softgel Capsule (Bovine Gelatin, Glycerol, Phytic Acid, Caramel), Coconut MCT Oil, Glycerin Fatty Acid Ester, Beeswax

NO gluten, wheat, milk derivatives, preservatives, artificial coloring or flavouring

Country of Origin:

100% Made in Japan

Disclaimer: This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease. If you are pregnant, nursing, or taking any medication, please consult your physician before consuming any supplements.

🌿 I. Product Strategy (Core Points)

👉 The biggest difference from regular skincare is here:

🧴 Skincare products: Applied to the skin's surface

🍑 This: Ingested → Works from within the body

💡 Think of it as: Providing the skin with \"hydrating ingredients,\" rather than just external hydration.

⭐ II. Main Ingredient Direction (General Understanding)

✔ Ceramides

👉 Helps the skin retain moisture and reduce water loss

👉 Particularly crucial for dry, flaky skin

✔ Collagen

👉 Makes skin more elastic and reduces roughness

✔ Vitamins (C/B complex)

👉 Helps fight oxidation and maintain skin condition

👉 The overall strategy is:

💧 Moisturizing + 🧬 Repairing + ✨ Mild Anti-aging

💪 III. Changes You'll Experience (To Be Realistic)

After consistently using it for a period of time, you'll generally feel these things: 👇

✔ Skin isn't as dry (most noticeable)

✔ Makeup applies better and is less prone to creasing

✔ Skin feels smoother to the touch

✔ A slight \"moisturizing\" feeling

❗ But let's be clear:

👉 It's not the kind of product that \"suddenly makes your skin whiter and smoother\"

👉 It's more about a gradual, nourishing effect.

🍑 IV. Product Experience

✨ Peach flavor → Easy to eat

✨ Small packets → Convenient to carry around

✨ Powder → Can be eaten directly or mixed with water

👉 Many people eat it as a \"beauty snack\" 😄

👥 V. Suitable for

👉 Highly recommended for:

🌬️ Dry skin, prone to peeling

🧴 Skin that still feels dry despite extensive skincare

🧑‍💻 For those who spend long hours in air-conditioned rooms

🧓 For those who want to do basic skincare

🕒 VI. How to take it

✔ 1-2 strips per day

✔ No time restrictions (more comfortable after meals)

👉 One box lasts about a month

详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "SUPERCHARGE YOUR SKIN! Experience the power of effective nutrition with RED SUN Super Collagen Peptides. This advanced Made in Japan formula combines micro-molecule fish-derived collagen peptides, hyaluronic acid, and elastin peptides to enhance skin elasticity and hydration while supporting your overall well-being. Infused with the antioxidant-rich goodness of mangosteen and blueberry extracts, alongside essential vitamins, our Super Collagen Peptides provide a comprehensive approach to maintaining a youthful and vibrant appearance."}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-live-01.slatic.net/p/cc8bfedd77eab4b41f1633c95a312a40.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-live-01.slatic.net/p/bd333bdcd0e2e3a2be75d3824c0cf98e.jpg"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-live-01.slatic.net/p/ca7c95cbfb4b8cdbd473c73a65fac2d9.jpg"}, {"type": "text", "text": "红日牌胶原蛋白肽 养颜美肤营养补助食品 • 120 颗 高微分子胶原蛋白肽及高微分子玻尿酸配方 高养肤美容功效 高强度抗衰老 新加坡品牌 日本制造 肌肤老化的原因 随着年龄的增长，我们的皮肤发生了重大变化。体内的胶原蛋白和玻尿酸的合成率缓慢及下降，导致严重衰老迹象，例如：细纹、皱纹、雀斑、皮肤干燥、松弛、下垂、失去光泽与弹性，使外貌看起来比实际年龄更老。 预防和延缓衰老 红日牌胶原蛋白肽是高端美肤养颜营养保健极品 ，由高质量的高微分子胶原蛋白肽、高微分子玻尿酸精制而成，有效提高驻颜养肤、抗衰老功效。 高微分子胶原蛋白肽及高微分子玻尿酸 红日牌胶原蛋白肽的功效不同于市场上一般的普通胶原蛋白或玻尿酸，由于红日牌胶原蛋白肽的“高微分子胶原蛋白肽及高微分子玻尿酸”的分子非常微小，所以能渗透入皮肤深层，直接快速有效被体內吸收，吸收率越高，修复、美肤养颜、延缓和预防老化效果就更好更强。 红日牌胶原蛋白肽的独特配方还加入弹性 蛋白肽、山竹皮萃取物、蓝莓萃取物、维他命C及维他命B1、B2、B3、B6、B7， 更強化体内抗氧化功能，预防皮肤深层受损，有效护肤养肤，保持年轻。 减少岁月留下衰老痕迹，让您更年轻更亮丽 红日牌胶原蛋白肽高质量、高精制的特别配方，能深入渗透到皮肤中，发挥最强养颜护肤抗老化功效。 红日牌胶原蛋白肽，使您的肌肤由内美到外，实现健康、光泽、细嫩柔滑、年轻，减少岁月在您脸上留下衰老痕迹。 (每颗) 高微分子鱼胶原蛋白肽 - 67mg 高微分子玻尿酸 - 8mg 弹性蛋白肽 - 8mg 山竹皮萃取物 - 3mg 蓝莓萃取物 - 3mg 维他命 B1 - 0.24mg 维他命 B2 - 0.27mg 维他命 B3 - 2.5mg 维他命 B6 - 0.24mg 维他命 B7 - 0.84mg 维他命 C - 17mg 每天六颗，早餐前三颗，睡前三颗。"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-test-11.slatic.net/shop/5d7b2739daf7f78732ed5906c8bf858b.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-test-11.slatic.net/shop/bd467523306f4320d0ca4585c27ce746.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-test-11.slatic.net/shop/9dee0c0ddc447f31716e77f763f5a833.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-test-11.slatic.net/shop/2759cc0265e8c5a235ebebd760564560.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-test-11.slatic.net/shop/9eeced934bc05a634f76997f3222b86e.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-test-11.slatic.net/shop/a8934c7fd034d0a4941a14f3514e04b2.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-test-11.slatic.net/shop/75d6de070990e983d70f6bc4cc60f21a.png"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-test-11.slatic.net/shop/29053a2bff1fab0996aa80dc7cac1aba.png"}]

SUPERCHARGE YOUR SKIN! Experience the power of effective nutrition with RED SUN Super Collagen Peptides. This advanced Made in Japan formula combines micro-molecule fish-derived collagen peptides, hyaluronic acid, and elastin peptides to enhance skin elasticity and hydration while supporting your overall well-being. Infused with the antioxidant-rich goodness of mangosteen and blueberry extracts, alongside essential vitamins, our Super Collagen Peptides provide a comprehensive approach to maintaining a youthful and vibrant appearance.

红日牌胶原蛋白肽

养颜美肤营养补助食品 • 120 颗

  • 高微分子胶原蛋白肽及高微分子玻尿酸配方
  • 高养肤美容功效
  • 高强度抗衰老
  • 新加坡品牌 日本制造

肌肤老化的原因

随着年龄的增长，我们的皮肤发生了重大变化。体内的胶原蛋白和玻尿酸的合成率缓慢及下降，导致严重衰老迹象，例如：细纹、皱纹、雀斑、皮肤干燥、松弛、下垂、失去光泽与弹性，使外貌看起来比实际年龄更老。

预防和延缓衰老

红日牌胶原蛋白肽是高端美肤养颜营养保健极品，由高质量的高微分子胶原蛋白肽、高微分子玻尿酸精制而成，有效提高驻颜养肤、抗衰老功效。

高微分子胶原蛋白肽及高微分子玻尿酸

红日牌胶原蛋白肽的功效不同于市场上一般的普通胶原蛋白或玻尿酸，由于红日牌胶原蛋白肽的“高微分子胶原蛋白肽及高微分子玻尿酸”的分子非常微小，所以能渗透入皮肤深层，直接快速有效被体內吸收，吸收率越高，修复、美肤养颜、延缓和预防老化效果就更好更强。

红日牌胶原蛋白肽的独特配方还加入弹性蛋白肽、山竹皮萃取物、蓝莓萃取物、维他命C及维他命B1、B2、B3、B6、B7，更強化体内抗氧化功能，预防皮肤深层受损，有效护肤养肤，保持年轻。

减少岁月留下衰老痕迹，让您更年轻更亮丽

红日牌胶原蛋白肽高质量、高精制的特别配方，能深入渗透到皮肤中，发挥最强养颜护肤抗老化功效。

红日牌胶原蛋白肽，使您的肌肤由内美到外，实现健康、光泽、细嫩柔滑、年轻，减少岁月在您脸上留下衰老痕迹。
